name: Running Coach: Onboard

description.en: Tell the coach your goal, current fitness level, and availability so it can build your personal training plan.
description.de: Teile dem Coach dein Ziel, dein aktuelles Fitnesslevel und deine Verfügbarkeit mit, damit er deinen persönlichen Trainingsplan erstellen kann.

bot: Use this at the start to collect the user's running profile. Once submitted, save a memory with the full profile (goal, distance, pace, days/week, race date) and generate a personalized training plan.

inputs.name: Running Goal
inputs.bot: The user's primary running goal. Use this to set the overall training direction.

inputs.name: Current Longest Run

description.en: What's the furthest you can run right now without stopping? (km)
description.de: Wie weit kannst du aktuell ohne Pause laufen? (km)

inputs.bot: Current aerobic base in kilometers. Used to calibrate starting week and long run distance.

inputs.name: Current Pace

description.en: Roughly how fast do you run? (minutes per km)
description.de: Wie schnell läufst du ungefähr? (Minuten pro km)

inputs.bot: Current easy pace in min/km. Used to set appropriate training zones and target race pace.

inputs.name: Training Days per Week

description.en: How many days per week can you run?
description.de: An wie vielen Tagen pro Woche kannst du laufen?

inputs.bot: Available training days per week. Use this to structure the weekly plan — more days means more variety (easy, tempo, long run).

inputs.name: Race Date

description.en: Do you have a target race date? (optional)
description.de: Hast du ein Zieldatum für einen Lauf? (optional)

inputs.bot: Optional target race date (ISO format). If provided, work backwards to structure the training phases with a taper week before the race.

success.en: Profile saved. Building your training plan now...
success.de: Profil gespeichert. Dein Trainingsplan wird erstellt...
